pm;D:\PyCharm Community Edition 2025.2.4 in;.

testcase.name: Verify if a place is added successfully using the Add Place API

testcase.system-out: /maps/api/place/add/json Request method: POST Request URI: https://rahulshettyacademy.com/maps/api/place/add/json?key=qaclick123 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: key=qaclick123 Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "accuracy": 50, "address": "World Cross Center", "language": "English", "location": { "lat": -38.383494, "lng": 33.427362 }, "name": "AppleHouse", "phone_number": "\"(+91) 983 893 3937", "types": [ "shoe park", "shop" ], "website": "http://google.com" }
